poems.title: my queen
poems.content:
she's as smooth as butter,
she melts to my words,
and she, my hummingbird,
she is a thousand miles away,
if only the breeze could carry me to her,
I'd wear the wind like arms around her frame

I wanna be cuffed, imprisoned in her ribs,
is there a better devil to possess? I dare you.
is there a better art than she?

never did I know I'd find someone this sweet,
as sweet as the nectar,
even the bees must be envious of this queen,
for she has ruined me, and I am hers to ruin.

poems.title: spoiled
poems.content:
she screams in her dreams
loves ma beans, not the greens
some days itz on da extremes
she’s always on the screens
is that microsoft teams?
onlyfans, she streams
woman, time to get those trims
she creams, later cleans
but these, her only themes
she’s always wet, is she in the marines?

poems.title: rage
poems.content:
God gave me such rage
I destroy those around me
I’m sitting in a house full of snakes
I’m the venom that kills them all
I shall never hurt another soul I once thought
I have only gone back to do it once again
This poem is full of agony
My heart is no less than a tragedy
I strive hard to look up you, oh gentler being
Calm my waves before I wash up a tsunami

poems.title: mother
poems.content:
Oh dear mother,
Take me into your cradle, I am but your child,
Take me home, I am but a part of your creation,

Oh divine mother,
Take me into your lap, I am but your worshipper,
Take me closer to your power, I am but a part of your existence,

Oh Shakti,
Take me into your haven, I am but a part of your consciousness,
Take me closer and closer, I only desire to be a part of you

poems.title: his love
poems.content:
Let me listen to your voice, the one I rejoice
Don’t let me make a choice, you’re my favorite noise
I’m sorry but I can’t cut my boys
Surely some of my scattered toys
I’m up for the endless joys
I promise I’ll keep you moist

poems.title: paradise
poems.content:
we belong to none but each other,
always in each others arms,
join me in my space,
let’s go to our paradise.

poems.title: grace
poems.content:
I fell for you even in my dreams,
only to rise alone in silent seams,
I miss all your whims, your quite grace,
a touch that vanished without a trace.

poems.title: pain au chocolat
poems.content:
she’s fluffy like a croissant,
so I ate her with chocolat.

poems.title: my goddess
poems.content:
she was as beautiful as the goddess,
I sinned with the her in the night,
then I knelt to pray in the day.

poems.title: cigarette
poems.content:
she was fluffy like my pillow,
got me breathing heavy on her,
now even my bed has feelings for me.

poems.title: life as we live it
poems.content:
how sad it must be,
to fall on this earth without your permission,
to play the game of life in advanced mode,
to go through a series of desperation,
to go through a series of sadness,
and sail without friends safely.

poems.title: game of life
poems.content:
I host my own game
play by my own rules
and still lose them all

poems.title: connection
poems.content:
I wait for my soul to reconnect
then release my poems
to forever belong in her arms

poems.title: diamond ring
poems.content:
my will, strong as a hill
I will write my story in yours
and call it a crossover of life
a diamond ring up your finger
an entire life, over to you

poems.title: deep inside
poems.content:
I have a heart so empty yet heavy
I dug deep to find myself
all I see are traces of you
come here, come into my space
be the reason I open myself to you

poems.title: acceptance
poems.content:
I asked the water in the ocean,
how do you burn so hot yet stay calm?
I asked the snow in the lake,
how are you so cold yet beautiful?
I asked the vapor in air,
how are you so light yet sublime?
It said, “I embrace my true state without hesitation,
for true strength, lies in acceptance.”

poems.title: lost soul
poems.content:
all souls lost and depressed
today I come to make friends with my destiny
will you join hands, as we go through this together?
I am but a lost soul
deep in the abyss there exists a pain that cannot be told but only felt
join me as I bridge it with your warmth

poems.title: the return
poems.content:
as each of my day passes through,
for you, my craving peaks,
I wait, to receive your love,
I hope it’ll come back to me one day.

poems.title: downhill
poems.content:
she was my maze, I was her craze,
my life, once was pristine on the hill,
from there on, it was only downhill,
vape was my escape,
and darkness, my only light,
I shook hands with my shadow,
trapped in my own sorrow.

poems.title: void
poems.content:
I touch the emptiness of my soul
I feel the void
will you bridge it with your love?

poems.title: her
poems.content:
her voice was a medicine to my loneliness,
her laugh was a cure to every ailment of my soul,
her silent stare was a gift to my eyes.

poems.title: how would I know?
poems.content:
how would the hands know where to reach?
poor things don’t have eyes
how would the flower know how fragrant it is?
poor things lack a nose
how would the sun know how hot it is?
how would she know how hot she is?

poems.title: lies
poems.content:
with the lies you told me each day
I could build a fortress
mine ended a long time ago
your lies, they never do
I can’t take them anymore
I can’t take you anymore

poems.title: hurt
poems.content:
what brain rot have you brought in me?
thought she was a beauty from another dimension
turns out she was a bitch, from the universe same as mine

poems.title: innocence
poems.content:
why isn’t there love deficit of fakeness
why isn’t there love as clear as the still water
as sweet as the nectar of the flower
as innocent as the child’s laugh?

poems.title: belong with me
poems.content:
I will to take you into my arms
forever will you belong with me?
will you come closer to my ribs
listen as my heart beats?
every beat is a chant of your name
oh goddess, can I worship you every season?

poems.title: carry
poems.content:
flirt with the wind
say your wishes it shall carry them to your love
pray to the sun
it shall shine your love on her everyday
ask for the rain
to shower on her and show her the colors of your rainbow
so she will giggle someday

poems.title: do not
poems.content:
do not over step your place
do not over play your game
do not over text in her DMs
one day, you shall be left with nothing to say

poems.title: flashback
poems.content:
I had a thousand words to say
then I saw her
I forgot not just my words
but even how to speak
I had a thousand stories to share
I spent time with her
we made memories
with all our moments

poems.title: pick her up
poems.content:
She fell for my flirts
so I picked her up as I fell for her lies

poems.title: whisper
poems.content:
I was the silence before the thunder,
she was the whisper of the storm.

poems.title: trees
poems.content:
the trees burn each day
just as my heart blazes each night
longing for her love

poems.title: gardener
poems.content:
fight me, and you’ll return to the soil
for I am a gardener who grows flowers

poems.title: fate
poems.content:
oh fate, you charmed me at the start
why now do you chain my heart?

poems.title: appetite
poems.content:
I’ll never keep you hungry
only thirsty

poems.title: cat
poems.content:
will you be my little cat,
I only want to gently pet you and give kisses on your forehead?

poems.title: poetry
poems.content:
will you be my poetry?
I only want to read you to the depths
understand the unspoken lines

poems.title: music
poems.content:
her voice was music to my ears
listening to her talk was my therapy

poems.title: nocturnal
poems.content:
he’s just another being, she’s a nocturnal being
her mood, swings like a monkey on the trees
his patience, going downhill like a ski
how do I love yet live, at the same time?

poems.title: desire
poems.content:
He’s lost simping, no thinking, always kinking
she's in her bed whispering, her desires, gently peaking
his touch, exhilarating, their hearts, accelerating
lips desiring to meet, passion steaming

poems.title: loan
poems.content:
You hold the love I gave
I’ve become a bank loan now
I’m here to collect it back
with all the interest you owe

poems.title: silence
poems.content:
I once wandered alone in this world
a place filled with misery
I walked, I paced, and one day, I became still
so serene, silence now speaks to my soul
From within, a transformation occurred
I discovered myself
Nothing can shake me, or break me
no pain can ever pierce my being

poems.title: blossom
poems.content:
Oh baby, you blossom so as a flower
Can I smell your fragrance through every petal?

poems.title: feather
poems.content:
Oh dear, you are as delicate as a feather
Can I hold you in my arms every season?

poems.title: my gift
poems.content:
Oh my Fanta, I fantasize you every night 👄
I wish you were my gift from Santa

poems.title: prisoner
poems.content:
You stole my heart, cuffed me
Took me a prisoner of your love

poems.title: gora
poems.content:
Girl doing such gore stuff
imma call you aghora
I wanna chant your name, oh goddess
like a mantra
Your lights so vivid
are you Aurora?

poems.title: cage
poems.content:
I’m yours already, as you are mine
I am smoother than butter, and I fall for you
Oh thinker, can you think of me every hour?
I’m in a paradise of our love
Will you cage me, in your ribs, forever?
Love me, Cuff me, forever tie me to your name?

poems.title: disappointment
poems.content:
The human race
always in a race against time
never do they fail to disappoint me
Lust, anger, greediness and other vices
chaining our evolution
Devil and me have chosen our paths
2 roads, too diverse to cross
Test my patience just once
and I will test the soil to bury you

poems.title: Us
poems.content:
Oh surfer of the internet
Listen to my tale of the devil
I sleep at night, she is awake
Her beauty, unmatched
Once, danced to my music
She is fire, I am ice
Her chaos meets my calm
She is the storm, I’m the sea
Forever clashing, never free
She jumps towards me like a rabbit
But her touch, toxic to the brink

poems.title: dahlia
poems.content:
I bought some Dahlia for her
Radiant and rare
Pushed her more into a delusional scare
Their fragrance, aromatic, pierced her soul
I was only beginning to resign
Brilliant yet bright, vivid yet frail
Confused, she stayed with her heart pale

poems.title: bleed
poems.content:
Everyday my heart, it bleeds
I see you now and again
But I don’t see you with me anymore
Where have you gone, oh dear one?

poems.title: if only
poems.content:
If only cupid would draw his bow once more
If only santa brought her back as my gift
If only life were so fair a game
If only I had never let go of her hand

poems.title: wintertime
poems.content:
There might be a summertime sadness
but there’s a wintertime sadness
For sadness does not understand seasons

poems.title: lost
poems.content:
What’s this despair? What’s this sadness?
Can I ever choose happiness, to be with her forever?
Gifted her flowers, gifted her dreams
Yet love feels distant, I’m so lost it seems
If life gave me a choice, I’d choose her again
Without a thought of the loss or the pain we been through,
For in your smile, my heart finds solace
With you, my love, I’m at my best always

poems.title: painting
poems.content:
Sometimes, I wish I was a painting
I could have you staring at me for hours
Caged on a wall, waiting to be described
I wonder what I would be
Oh painter of love, what themes have you in mind, you draw me towards?
Would you take care of me, in all your colors?
Take your time to paint your love, this timeless piece of ours

poems.title: desire
poems.content:
What my heart desires is for your love
Will you care for me like you always do
I may have never held your hands in mine
I only wish for you to hold on to them forever
Is it too much to ask, is it too much to plead?
For your care, and grace, I’ll wait for yet another million years

poems.title: cobra
poems.content:
She’s so cute she’s king cobra
She’s a king always spitting venom, oh bruh
Wears a tiara, we both in Sahara
Life’s a movie, idk the genre, it sure looks drama
God, pull me out of this and take me to Nirvana!

poems.title: burrito
poems.content:
She’s my burrito, I’m her dorito,
Let’s go have some mojito,
I sing in her ears every night like a mosquito,
She‘s so cute, she is muy bonito,
Why don’t you come into my arms, my Bonita?

poems.title: a dream
poems.content:
It's funny how fast the time flies by,
By the time you realize you're already alumni,
Wasn't it only yesterday you talked to me eye to eye,
I guess you wanted to be my ally, this, you can't possibly deny,
You took me to an extreme, I knew you loved me,
I told you, that I loved you, as loud as a battle cry,
Together, we'd make a great team,
If you're beside me, won't my strength multiply?
There be any upstream, I'll tackle it with my own bloodstream,
Isn't it more than just a gleam or did I just dream?

poems.title: a poets poem
poems.content:
I’m a poet in the making,
Waiting to know when I’ll be made,
Wanting to know when I’ll make some bread,
Sky may meet the earth one day,
but I’ll never stop making my poems any day.

poems.title: butter
poems.content:
She blooms like a flower
cute as a baby tamatar
From me, she gets it nice and slower
only to toss me into the gutter
She so smooth, I called her mom
said, she raised a fine butter

poems.title: human
poems.content:
All we as humans want is happiness,
We want joy, we crave praise,
We all want bliss, a piece of everything.
This world does not have all that you desire,
Only little of what you ask for.
To be happy is to not grab from another,
What have we done, if not hurt another?

poems.title: wind
poems.content:
Oh mighty wind, will you carry me towards her?
Take me to the land of love, the eternal paradise?
Closer to where I can listen to her heart beat?

poems.title: sweetie
poems.content:
Oh my sweet sweetie
You’re sweeter than jalebi
Your rosy lips make me go crazy
I desire to touch my lips to yours
You keep touching my heart
I wanna touch your stomach from the inside

poems.title: oh sailor
poems.content:
We only just met, you're my trailer
Guess I won't be seeing more of you, o sailor
Come back sooner, this dunya ain’t so nicer

poems.title: uncertain
poems.content:
I waited for her calls, I waited for her texts
Never did they come, Never did they reach
I waited for a day, I waited for a week
I wanted to be in her heart, Ended up on the street
She was a doctor, I was a layman
I was the disease, She was the cure
Will we ever talk? Will we ever meet?
The bond is so real but this fate, so unreal

poems.title: loop
poems.content:
I feel love, I flirt
I feel funny, I joke
I offend someone, I fight back
I get sad, I write rap
I feel hurt, I write poem
I feel broken, I reach for the divine
The divine is beyond boundaries
Teaches me again and again what love is
I feel love, I flirt…. ♾️

poems.title: prism
poems.content:
I’m tryna find you harder than your algorithm
You’re in my hands, playing to my rhythm
Imma look into your eyes thru a prism
I’ll shut off this world for ya, there ain’t no criticism
You’re my coping mechanism
I visit your heart everyday, I call it tourism
I be wanting your love, this is just realism

poems.title: boat
poems.content:
She’s always in her white coat
I’m waitin on the love boat
You’re the dip to my snack
A trip to my soul
Gonna need the ice
Imma bring in some spice
I could be a vegan
But I’m craving you tonight!
You must be the sun
you rise in the East
You heat up my heart
like a spark in the dark
You must be thums up
You rile up……toofan in ma heart

poems.title: baby
poems.content:
Simping is a crime
but pimping is divine?
Droppin bombs to thrive
They’re all drinking wine
Baby you’re a 9
I want your booty close to mine

poems.title: a minute
poems.content:
I missed you for a minute,
a minute for every two minutes,
I ran behind you,
How far ever I ran, I couldn’t catch you,
Later did I realize, I was on a treadmill,
Tryna get a hold of you, I got on a plane,
and you flew away like the air itself.

poems.title: indescribable
poems.content:
There is something abt her that’s indescribable,
yet beautiful and shiny,
There is something abt her that’s indescribable,
yet cute and sweety,
There is something abt her that’s indescribable,
yet light and airy,
Though indescribable I could keep describing her.

poems.title: orchid
poems.content:
She blooms at night,
Shines all night,
She stares at my sight,
My heart’s takin a flight,
She’s my orchid,
And I’m holding her in my hands.

poems.title: void
poems.content:
She’s leaving this place and I’m left with an empty space,
What’s with all this race and her absence, will I ever embrace?
Her voice was something I could never hear again,
Her texts are something I could never find again,
She riled up my heart deep but my soul deeper,
Her presence echoes in my heart yet there’s an emptiness in my soul,
I asked fate, “Will we ever cross paths again?”

poems.title: her love
poems.content:
she’s white I’m black, she’s ying I’m yang
I rap, she claps, we both only yap
she rings in my heart, I ring in her soul
we’re like dairy milk, we melt over each other

poems.title: lazy day
poems.content:
After I sent her koochiku koochiku in the night, I set an alarm for 6 AM and woke up at 11. It's like I'm in a competition with the sun, motherf*cker always rises before me. Went outside to get my morning smoke, and before I could even take my first puff, the sun hit me. I felt violated bro, he was tryna kiss me. Hatt madarch*d. No LGBTQ ah.

Looked at my reflection in a car window. My hair was at that “bhai ye kya haal bana rakha hai?” stage. Walked to the barber, sat in the chair, and showed him what I wanted. He nodded with full confidence and said "Ye konsi movie me hai?" Zayn Malik tha woh. That’s when I was preparing to get f*cked.

Scissors started moving, trimmer went bzzzz, and halfway through, he stopped. Tilted his head. Spit his paan. Then continued like a man solving a Fourier series problem. Even he didn’t know what hairstyle he was giving me. He kept going hoping it’ll come out nice.

Later he dusted off my face with his babaji ka peacock feathers, turned the chair, and showed me the mirror. I blinked my eyes once, stared at him as he looked at me. He said "Bhaisaab Mashallah dikhre teen din me Shoaib Malik dikhenge” "Behench*d ab dikhna hai mereko, WOH BHI ZAYN MALIK". Bro, if you can control the hairstyle the barber is baby giving you, you are the real fucking alpha, I swear.
